Bridging NFT to BNB Smart Chain (BSC)
  Transfer any of your ScarQuest universe NFT from Velas to the BNB Smart Chain (BSC), select network and transfer all your NFT to BSC with a simple one click batch transfer.

Note
All participants are required to pay gas fees when transfering.
